title: Eliminate DEI in the Military Act
short_title: Eliminate DEI in the Military Act
stage_label: Referred to the Subcommittee on Coast Guard and Maritime Transportation.
crs_summary: Eliminate DEI in the Military Act This bill prohibits the use of federal funds for diversity, equity, and inclusion activities (e.g., training) of the Armed Forces, national service academies, or the Department of Defense.
last_action_text: Referred to the Subcommittee on Coast Guard and Maritime Transportation.
